description_long: This information point consists of a U-shaped arrangement of freestanding display boards, each supported by wooden or metal legs and featuring large printed panels with diagrams, images, and text. The boards are arranged to create a semi-enclosed area, inviting visitors to walk around and view the information from multiple angles. In the center, there is a rectangular table or counter with a circular map or diagram on its surface, serving as a focal point for interaction. Three life-sized human figures are present, suggesting the scale and intended use of the installation as an educational or informational exhibit. The display boards are visually unified by their clean, white surfaces and consistent framing, while the table adds a contrasting element with its darker base. The overall design is modern and functional, prioritizing accessibility and clear presentation of information.
description: A U-shaped cluster of freestanding display boards with a central information table, designed for public interaction and educational display.
description_view_0: The front view shows the open side of the U-shaped display, with three human figures engaging with the boards and the central table clearly visible.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the interior of the U-shape, showing the arrangement of the boards and the central table, with the figures interacting from different positions.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the backs of the display boards, revealing their support structures and the figures facing away, with minimal detail on the information panels.
description_view_3: A side-rear view showing the backs of the boards and the central table, with the figures mostly obscured and the display content not visible.
attribute_facade_detailing: The facade features large, clean white display panels with minimalistic framing and subtle support structures, emphasizing clarity and accessibility. The table surface is adorned with a colorful circular map or diagram, adding a focal visual element.
